summary: The agent concludes that although no specific evidence is provided for soluble TLR-2 activators directly present in most foods, certain food-based substances — particularly those derived from fermentative processes involving live microbes or their breakdown products — might include compounds able to stimulate TLR-2 due to exposure to bacterial PAMPs like LPS or other microbial fragments commonly found in diets rich in fermentation or unprocessed plant matter. This implies a possible indirect pathway through which diet influences innate immunity via activation of pattern recognition pathways mediated by TLR-2.

This implies a possible indirect pathway through which diet influences innate immunity via activation of pattern recognition pathways mediated by TLR-2.. Answer choice: A
